name: Animosity
description: A Maliwan pistol that can roll with a Torgue barrel, pushing its base impact well above that of a typical Maliwan sidearm. The trade-off is lower accuracy, slower fire rate, and longer reloads, while its splash component gives it extra value on builds that scale explosive-style damage.
notes: It deals bonus splash damage that can be increased by grenade-damage bonuses, so certain builds can raise its burst potential significantly.
